Plugin.Name: Plex Streams
Plugin.Overview: Adds a dashboard widget and sidebar entry showing currently active Plex Media Server streams: title, user, server, LAN/WAN location with country flag and geoip, playback position, transcode type (HW/CPU) or direct-play indicator, bandwidth, resolution and optional poster art. Click a stream to expand full per-stream details (player, codec, container, decision). Optional one-click terminate (opt-in via settings).
